title: Rocking Out

startPoint.en: Talk to Bill Teach in Mos Le'Harmless or Port Phasmatys. (or )
startPoint.es: Habla con Bill Teach en Mos Le'Harmless o Port Phasmatys. (o)

children.title: Recipe for Disaster: Freeing Pirate Pete
Recipe for Disaster: Another Cook's Quest

children.name: Dodgy Mike
children.display: You can buy pirate clothing from Dodgy Mike in Mos Le'Harmless, east of the bank

items.name: Book o' piracy
items.display: Book o' piracy (can be obtained during quest)

items.name: Customs Sergeant
items.display: The following items are required, but will need to be retrieved from your bank once you escape prison as you will be forced to deposit all of your worn/inventory items before the Customs Sergeant will send you to jail:

children.name: Ghostspeak amulet
children.display: Ghostspeak amulet (or cramulet) (unless you have completed the Hard Morytania achievements)

items.name: Coin
items.display: 20 coins (or more, depending on how you travel to Port Phasmatys)

recommended.name: Port Sarim lodestone
recommended.display: Activated Port Sarim, Karamja, and Canifis lodestone

recommended.name: Again, retrieve these after you escape jail:
recommended.display: Again, retrieve these after you escape jail:

children.name: Arc journal
children.display: Arc journal for fast travel to Port Sarim's Rusty Anchor

recommended.name: Weight-reducing clothing
recommended.display: Weight-reducing clothing (for the part where you must weigh under 28 kg)

recommended.name: Dungeoneering cape
recommended.display: Dungeoneering cape for fast travel to Braindeath Island

kills: 2x Customs Officer (level 37) without any equipment or food

rewards.name: Brimhaven Agility Arena
rewards.display: Free access to the Brimhaven Agility Arena

rewards.name: Rock Island Prison
rewards.display: Access to the Rock Island Prison, where players can steal from customs evidence files

rewards.name: Bank deposit box
rewards.display: Access to a bank deposit box in Rimmington

rewards.name: Braindeath 'rum'
rewards.display: The ability to buy Braindeath 'rum' from The Rusty Anchor Inn

rewards.name: Mos Le'Harmless
rewards.display: The ability to understand pirates on Mos Le'Harmless without the book o' piracy

rewards.name: Pirate impling
rewards.display: The ability to catch pirate implings (with 76 )

rewards.name: Ex-ex-parrot
rewards.display: The ability to raise an ex-ex-parrot by speaking to Bill Teach and 50 Ships Mufassah (with 71 )

text.en: Travel to Mos Le'Harmless (fairy ring DIP if you have repaired the bridge with 8 planks and 16 nails and partial completion of A Fairy Tale III).
text.es: Viaja a Mos Le'Harmless (anillo de las hadas DIP si has reparado el puente con 8 planks y 16 nails y completado parcialmente A Fairy Tale III).

text.en: Talk to Bill Teach in The Other Inn.
text.es: Habla con Bill Teach en The Other Inn.

text.en: If you have lost your Little Book o' Piracy, talk to him to get a new one.
text.es: Si has perdido tu Little Book o' Piracy, habla con él para conseguir uno nuevo.

text.en: Buy three pieces of pirate clothing from Dodgy Mike's Second-hand Clothing.
text.es: Compra tres piezas de ropa pirata en Dodgy Mike's Second-hand Clothing.

text.en: 3 pieces of pirate clothing
Go to house in south-east Rimmington with the Customs Sergeant while wearing three pieces of pirate clothing.
text.es: Ve a la casa al sureste de Rimmington con el Customs Sergeant mientras llevas puestas tres piezas de ropa pirata.

text.en: Read the noticeboard next to the entrance door for information on the answers to the trick questions. The answers to the trick questions are different for everyone.
text.es: Lee el tablón de anuncios junto a la puerta de entrada para obtener información sobre las respuestas a las preguntas trampa. Las respuestas a las preguntas trampa son diferentes para cada jugador.

text.en: Talk to the Customs Sergeant
text.es: Habla con el Customs Sergeant

text.en: Taking note of the ship name/s he references, select the answers that match the story on noticeboard.
text.es: Tomando nota del nombre o nombres del barco que menciona, selecciona las respuestas que coincidan con la historia del tablón de anuncios.

text.en: Deposit all your items in the Locker on the north side of the room. You need to store all the items you are wearing as well as dismiss any familiars.
text.es: Deposita todos tus objetos en el Locker en el lado norte de la sala. Necesitas guardar todos los objetos que llevas puestos, así como despedir a cualquier familiar.

text.en: Talk to the Customs Sergeant again.
text.es: Habla de nuevo con el Customs Sergeant.

text.en: Once in the prison, shout-through the barred window to your east.
text.es: Una vez en la prisión, grita a través de la ventana enrejada al este.

text.en: Pick up the tin cup in the cell and use it on the cell door 3 times until Heavy-Handed Harry throws stew on you, turning your prison uniform top into a fishy prison uniform top.
text.es: Recoge la taza de hojalata en la celda y úsala en la puerta de la celda 3 veces hasta que Heavy-Handed Harry te tire guiso encima, convirtiendo la parte superior de tu uniforme de prisionero en una parte superior de uniforme de prisionero apestosa a pescado.

text.en: Right-click tap the pipes on the eastern wall to receive a pipe.
text.es: Haz clic derecho y toca las tuberías en la pared este para recibir una tubería.

text.en: Shout-through your cell door until you receive a quill, paper, and ink bottle.
text.es: Grita a través de la puerta de tu celda hasta que recibas una pluma, papel y un frasco de tinta.

text.en: Leave your cell through the hole to the north and search the rubble to receive an accordion (broken).
text.es: Sal de tu celda por el agujero al norte y busca en los escombros para recibir un acordeón (roto).

text.en: Use the ink bottle on the paper to receive inky paper and ink bottle (empty).
text.es: Usa el frasco de tinta en el papel para obtener papel entintado y un frasco de tinta (vacío).

text.en: Use the ink bottle (empty) on the sharp rock outside on the east-most wall near the pier to get a smashed bottle.
text.es: Usa el frasco de tinta (vacío) en la roca afilada de fuera, en la pared más al este cerca del muelle, para conseguir una botella rota.

text.en: In order, use the smashed bottle, pipe, and inky paper on the accordion to get a vacuum pump.
text.es: En orden, usa la botella rota, la tubería y el papel entintado en el acordeón para obtener una bomba de vacío.

text.en: Use your fishy prison uniform top on the perch rock just east of the hole in the wall.
text.es: Usa la parte superior de tu uniforme de prisionero apestosa a pescado en la roca del posadero justo al este del agujero en la pared.

text.en: Right-click use the vacuum pump on the perch rock once the seagull appears.
text.es: Haz clic derecho y usa la bomba de vacío en la roca del posadero una vez que aparezca la gaviota.

text.en: Right-click use the vacuum pump and gull on the barred window.
text.es: Haz clic derecho y usa la bomba de vacío y la gaviota en la ventana enrejada.

text.en: Dive off the pier on the east side of the island.
text.es: Salta desde el muelle en el lado este de la isla.

text.en: Two bronze wires, pirate clothing, charcoal (can be obtained during quest), diving apparatus, fishbowl helmet, ghostspeak amulet, at least 20 coins, and 5 empty inventory spaces.
Ectophial (for fast travel to Port Phasmatys), Arc journal (for fast travel to Port Sarim), and weight-reducing clothing
Travel to Braindeath Island by speaking to Pirate Pete north of Port Phasmatys.
text.es: Viaja a Braindeath Island hablando con Pirate Pete al norte de Port Phasmatys.

text.en: Go west and speak to Captain Braindeath. He will give you the fake beard, fake moustache and nose, fake monocle, moustache and nose, curly wig, and straight wig disguises.
text.es: Ve al oeste y habla con Captain Braindeath. Te dará la barba falsa, el bigote y nariz falsos, el monóculo falso, el bigote y nariz, la peluca rizada y la peluca lisa como disfraces.

text.en: Travel to the bar in north Port Sarim called The Rusty Anchor.
text.es: Viaja al bar en el norte de Port Sarim llamado The Rusty Anchor.

text.en: Talk to the Bartender.
text.es: Habla con el Bartender.

text.en: Talk to the Bartender again.
text.es: Habla de nuevo con el Bartender.

chatOptions: 3 I'll have a drink... and you have one too!

text.en: Repeat this about five times until he says he's tired.
text.es: Repite esto unas cinco veces hasta que diga que está cansado.

text.en: Go outside, put on a disguise, and then ask about the rum again. Repeat this step with each disguise.
text.es: Sal fuera, ponte un disfraz y luego pregunta de nuevo sobre el ron. Repite este paso con cada disfraz.

text.en: Talk to the bartender again, this time with no disguise, and he will give you an order slip.
text.es: Habla de nuevo con el bartender, esta vez sin disfraz, y te dará un albarán de pedido.

text.en: Speak to Redbeard Frank outside of The Rusty Anchor in Port Sarim.
text.es: Habla con Redbeard Frank fuera de The Rusty Anchor en Port Sarim.

text.en: Travel to Mos Le'Harmless via the charter boat, fairy ring DIP if you have repaired the bridge, or Bill Teach, and talk to Brother Tranquillity to receive a letter.
text.es: Viaja a Mos Le'Harmless en el barco chárter, el anillo de las hadas DIP si has reparado el puente, o con Bill Teach, y habla con Brother Tranquillity para recibir una carta.

chatOptions: 3 Talk about the letter for Frank.

text.en: Return to Redbeard Frank on the Port Sarim dock and deliver the letter.
text.es: Regresa con Redbeard Frank en el muelle de Port Sarim y entrégale la carta.

text.en: Put on your pirate clothing and head back to Braindeath Island.
text.es: Ponte tu ropa pirata y vuelve a Braindeath Island.

text.en: Talk to Captain Braindeath for his mark.
text.es: Habla con Captain Braindeath para conseguir su marca.

text.en: Go down the southern stairs, and talk to Captain Donnie to get plans.
text.es: Baja las escaleras del sur y habla con Captain Donnie para conseguir los planos.

text.en: Head north-west to 50% Luke by the bridge and use charcoal on him.
text.es: Dirígete al noroeste hacia 50% Luke, junto al puente, y usa carboncillo en él.

text.en: There is charcoal in a crate on the other side of the gate near 50% Luke.
text.es: Hay carboncillo en un cajón al otro lado de la verja cerca de 50% Luke.

text.en: Return to Redbeard Frank on the Port Sarim docks and exchange the Charcoal rubbing for Frank's mark.
text.es: Regresa con Redbeard Frank en el muelle de Port Sarim e intercambia el calco de carboncillo por la marca de Frank.

text.en: Optional: Talk to the bartender and ask about 'rum' once more to complete the Rusty Reward achievement required for the master quest cape.
text.es: Opcional: Habla con el bartender y pregunta sobre el 'ron' una vez más para completar el logro Rusty Reward necesario para la capa de maestro de misiones.

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry
steps.caption: The Brass Hand

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: Travel to Mos Le'Harmless.
text.es: Viaja a Mos Le'Harmless.

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: Talk to Bill Teach in The Other Inn to obtain an introduction letter.
text.es: Habla con Bill Teach en The Other Inn para obtener una carta de presentación.

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: Climb-up the bamboo ladder in Harpoon Joe's House of 'Rum' just north and speak with 50 Ships Mufassah.
text.es: Sube por la escalera de bambú en Harpoon Joe's House of 'Rum', justo al norte, y habla con 50 Ships Mufassah.

chatOptions: 1 Yes! Where do I sign up?

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: Talk to Brass Hand Harry for 5 broken hands.
text.es: Habla con Brass Hand Harry para conseguir 5 manos rotas.

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: Take-apart the five broken hands.
text.es: Desmonta las cinco manos rotas.

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: With the two bronze wires in your inventory, use any piece of the hand on another to trigger a puzzle.
text.es: Con los dos cables de bronce en tu inventario, usa una pieza de la mano en otra para activar un puzle.

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: Complete the puzzle to obtain a brass hand (the interface will close automatically when the puzzle has been completed).
text.es: Completa el puzle para obtener una mano de latón (la interfaz se cerrará automáticamente cuando el puzle se haya completado).

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: Try flipping the brace (bottom) piece if you're having trouble completing the puzzle.
text.es: Prueba a girar la pieza del soporte (la de abajo) si tienes problemas para completar el puzle.

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: The location of the hand is as important as the components; make sure you're constructing the hand atop the silhouette.
text.es: La ubicación de la mano es tan importante como los componentes; asegúrate de estar construyendo la mano sobre la silueta.

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: Talk to Brass Hand Harry (nearby) to receive an ink pad. Use the ink pad on the brass hand to get a inky hand. Then use the inky hand on the paper.
text.es: Habla con Brass Hand Harry (cerca) para recibir una almohadilla de tinta. Usa la almohadilla de tinta en la mano de latón para obtener una mano entintada. Luego usa la mano entintada en el papel.

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: Talk to Brass Hand Harry again to show him the completed Brass Hand Harry's mark.
text.es: Habla de nuevo con Brass Hand Harry para mostrarle la marca completada de Brass Hand Harry.

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: If you haven't done so yet, feel free to destroy the ink pad and hand.
text.es: Si aún no lo has hecho, puedes destruir la almohadilla de tinta y la mano.

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: Equip your ghostspeak amulet, diving apparatus, and fishbowl helmet.
text.es: Equípate el ghostspeak amulet, el diving apparatus y el fishbowl helmet.

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: Travel to Dragontooth Island by talking to the Ghost captain at the small boat in Port Phasmatys (he is at the south-eastern end of the docks).
text.es: Viaja a Dragontooth Island hablando con el Ghost captain en el pequeño bote de Port Phasmatys (está en el extremo sureste de los muelles).

chatOptions: 1 Please take me to Dragontooth Island!

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: Travel to the north-east part of Dragontooth Island and dive via the chain.
text.es: Viaja a la parte noreste de Dragontooth Island y sumérgete por la cadena.

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: You will need both hands free to dive.
text.es: Necesitarás tener ambas manos libres para sumergirte.

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: Swim around until you find a Karamthulhu and catch it. (It is the only fish that appears on the mini map.)
text.es: Nada por la zona hasta que encuentres un Karamthulhu y captúralo. (Es el único pez que aparece en el minimapa.)

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: Head over to the ship and climb-up the stairs.
text.es: Dirígete al barco y sube por las escaleras.

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: Open and search the chest to get a crowbar.
text.es: Abre y registra el cofre para conseguir una palanca.

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: An aggressive giant lobster may attack you. You can open and search the chest while being attacked.
text.es: Puede que te ataque una langosta gigante agresiva. Puedes abrir y registrar el cofre mientras te atacan.

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: Return down the stairs and climb down the ladder.
text.es: Baja de nuevo por las escaleras y desciende por la escalera de mano.

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: Go west on the bottom floor of the ship and dig the mess a several times to uncover the idol of many heads buried in the pile of planks and sand. Pick it up.
text.es: Ve al oeste en la planta baja del barco y cava en el montón varias veces para descubrir el ídolo de las muchas cabezas enterrado entre planks y arena. Recógelo.

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: You can wield weapons while down there digging, so you can kill any aggressive giant crabs or lobsters that may be hindering you from digging successfully.
text.es: Puedes llevar armas mientras excavas allí abajo, así que puedes matar a los cangrejos o langostas gigantes agresivos que puedan impedirte cavar con éxito.

steps.section: Bill Teach and Captain Brass Hand Harry

text.en: Bring the idol back to Bill Teach to receive Bill Teach's mark.
text.es: Lleva el ídolo de vuelta a Bill Teach para recibir la marca de Bill Teach.

text.en: Travel to Brimhaven and go to the Brimhaven Agility Arena entrance, located south-east of the docks.
text.es: Viaja a Brimhaven y ve a la entrada de la Brimhaven Agility Arena, situada al sureste de los muelles.

text.en: Speak to Cap'n Izzy No-Beard.
text.es: Habla con Cap'n Izzy No-Beard.

text.en: Return to the Rimmington Customs Office. Deposit all of your items in the locker and get arrested by talking to the Customs Sergeant.
text.es: Regresa a la Rimmington Customs Office. Deposita todos tus objetos en el locker y deja que te arreste el Customs Sergeant hablando con él.

text.en: Search the bed for a crude lockpick and use it on your cell door.
text.es: Registra la cama para conseguir una ganzúa rudimentaria y úsala en la puerta de tu celda.

text.en: Kill one of the customs officers, loot the uniform and equip it to disguise yourself.
text.es: Mata a uno de los agentes de aduanas, saquea el uniforme y equípatelo para disfrazarte.

text.en: You can withdraw your pickaxe from your tool belt to use as a weapon.
text.es: Puedes sacar tu pickaxe de tu tool belt para usarla como arma.

text.en: Make sure you do not have lootshare enabled, as this can prevent the uniform from being dropped. If you do not get the loot, try relogging.
text.es: Asegúrate de no tener activado el lootshare, ya que esto puede impedir que suelte el uniforme. Si no consigues el botín, intenta cambiar de mundo.

text.en: Climb the stairs twice to the top floor.
text.es: Sube las escaleras dos veces hasta la planta superior.

text.en: Open the door to the room with the cabinets.
text.es: Abre la puerta de la sala con los armarios.

text.en: Search the northern-most cabinet on the second column from the west for "Wanda the Fish".
text.es: Registra el armario más al norte de la segunda columna desde el oeste en busca de "Wanda the Fish".

text.en: Talk to the Locker Officer and receive the brooch.
text.es: Habla con el Locker Officer y recibe el broche.

text.en: Return to Cap'n Izzy No-Beard in Brimhaven to receive Izzy's mark.
text.es: Regresa con Cap'n Izzy No-Beard en Brimhaven para recibir la marca de Izzy.

steps.section: Back to prison and quest completion

text.en: Izzy's mark, Bill Teach's mark, Frank's mark, Braindeath's mark, and Brass Hand Harry's mark

steps.section: Back to prison and quest completion

text.en: Talk to the Customs Sergeant in Rimmington with the five marks. He will give you a file.
text.es: Habla con el Customs Sergeant en Rimmington con las cinco marcas. Te dará un expediente.

steps.section: Back to prison and quest completion

text.en: Use one of the marks on the file.
text.es: Usa una de las marcas en el expediente.

steps.section: Back to prison and quest completion

text.en: Talk to the Customs Sergeant to give him the filled file.
text.es: Habla con el Customs Sergeant para entregarle el expediente completado.

steps.section: Back to prison and quest completion

text.en: Talk to him again to get sent back to prison.
text.es: Habla con él de nuevo para que te envíe de vuelta a prisión.

steps.section: Back to prison and quest completion

text.en: Search the bed for the crude lockpick and break out of your cell. Kill the Customs Officer(s) for another uniform, equip it, then head to the top floor.
text.es: Registra la cama para conseguir la ganzúa rudimentaria y escapa de tu celda. Mata a el/los Customs Officer(s) para conseguir otro uniforme, equípatelo y luego dirígete a la planta superior.

steps.section: Back to prison and quest completion

text.en: You may get a message saying that the lock is rusty, and the lockpick does not work. Continue trying until it works.
text.es: Puede que recibas un mensaje diciendo que la cerradura está oxidada y que la ganzúa no funciona. Sigue intentándolo hasta que funcione.

steps.section: Back to prison and quest completion

text.en: Go to the top floor and talk to the Locker Officer to get back the filled file.
text.es: Ve a la planta superior y habla con el Locker Officer para recuperar el expediente completado.

steps.section: Back to prison and quest completion

text.en: Return to your cell and right-click open the door.
text.es: Regresa a tu celda y haz clic derecho para abrir la puerta.

steps.section: Back to prison and quest completion

text.en: If you do not have the option to open the cell door, hop to a different world.
text.es: Si no tienes la opción de abrir la puerta de la celda, cambia a otro mundo.

steps.section: Back to prison and quest completion

text.en: Shout-through the barred window to Young Ralph. A cutscene will follow.
text.es: Grita a través de la ventana enrejada a Young Ralph. Seguirá una escena cinemática.

steps.section: Back to prison and quest completion

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
